title: RUN INSTALLER
body: Accept defaults. The installer creates a Windows service (or systemd unit) that starts the gateway automatically.
code:
Windows:
  Run as Administrator
  Dir:  C:\Program Files\Inductive Automation\Ignition
  Svc:  Ignition Gateway
  Ports: 8088 (HTTP), 8043 (HTTPS)
Linux:
  chmod +x ignition-xxx.run
  sudo ./ignition-xxx.run
  Unit: /etc/systemd/system/ignition.service
key: wrapper.log is your first debug friend
mistakes: Changing the port and forgetting what you set
Not running as administrator on Windows
Installing to a path with spaces on Linux
